research.summary: get to know us - Plum https://plum. pl/en/about-us/ We are a manufacturer of industrial electronics, including controllers for heat pumps, boiler controllers, ventilation and underfloor heating controllers, sensors, gas volume converters, gas flow recorders, and other measurement devices.

outreach_notes: 该公司为Tier2潜力客户。可通过其销售或产品团队切入，推荐循环泵/阀门配套方案。
